prd.user_story: As a platform engineer conducting a cross-org compatibility audit, I need to find every repository that explicitly implements the k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage.Interface, so I know which teams across different organizations have independently built Kubernetes-compatible storage backends.
constraints: Find only implementations using the explicit `var _ storage.Interface = (*StructName)(nil)` pattern.
Search all repos in the multi-org ecosystem, not just the local kubernetes/kubernetes repo.
Report the repo, file path, and implementing struct name for each match.
prd.success_definition: Agent finds all structs from at least 2 different GitHub organizations that explicitly implement storage.Interface via the var _ compliance check pattern.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all explicit implementations of k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage.Interface (var _ storage.Interface = ...) across the multi-org-go repos.
